fields.label: Paybill Number
fields.description: M-Pesa Paybill number used by borrowers to repay loans.

fields.label: Paybill Account Reference
fields.description: Default account reference instruction (e.g. 'Your registered phone number').

fields.label: Lender Notification Email Override
fields.description: If set, all internal notifications go here instead of all Lender Manager users.

fields.label: Last Overdue Digest Sent
fields.description: Automatically updated by the daily scheduler. Reset manually to re-send the digest.
